mailbox/Mailbox/items.name: items
mailbox/Mailbox/items.description: The same as iteritems(), except that a list of pairs is returned rather than an iterator of pairs.

info.excerpt: The same as iteritems(), except that a list of pairs is returned rather than an iterator of pairs.

mailbox/Mailbox/iteritems.name: iteritems
mailbox/Mailbox/iteritems.description: Return an iterator over (key, message) pairs, where key is a key and message is a message representation. The messages are represented as instances of the appropriate format-specific Message subclass unless a custom message factory was specified when the Mailbox instance was initialized.

info.excerpt: Return an iterator over (key, message) pairs, where key is a key and message is a message representation. The messages are represented as instances of the appropriate format-specific Message subclass ...

mailbox/Mailbox/iterkeys.name: iterkeys
mailbox/Mailbox/iterkeys.description: Return an iterator over all keys

info.excerpt: Return an iterator over all keys

mailbox/Mailbox/itervalues.name: itervalues
mailbox/Mailbox/itervalues.description: Return an iterator over representations of all messages. The messages are represented as instances of the appropriate format-specific Message subclass unless a custom message factory was specified when the Mailbox instance was initialized. Note The behavior of __iter__() is unlike that of dictionaries, which iterate over keys.
